{"query":"Grand Theft Auto 6 PS5 Pro Xbox Series X enhanced edition specific features 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":843,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://blog.playstation.com/2026/06/24/grand-theft-auto-vi-plays-best-on-ps5-november-19/","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI plays best on PS5 November 19 – PlayStation.Blog","content":"Grand Theft Auto VI plays best on PS5 November 19
SIE and Rockstar Games work together to deliver the best experience on PS5 by leveraging its innovative features.
Since Grand Theft Auto first arrived on the original PlayStation in 1997, the series has defined generations of play.
We know players are excited for Grand Theft Auto VI, which heads to the state of Leonida — home to the neon-soaked streets of Vice City and beyond, in the biggest, most expansive evolution of the series yet.
Grand Theft Auto VI also leverages the PS5’s ultra-high speed SSD, enabling you to experience the expansive world of Leonida with near-instant load times.
Purchases made before November 20 will also include the Vintage Vice City Pack, a collection of items inspired by Vice City’s neon-soaked past.
Players who pre-order any edition on PlayStation Store will also receive a redeemable free month of GTA+."},{"url":"https://www.digitalfoundry.net/news/2026/06/df-weekly-the-gta-6-60fps-debate-returns-is-there-a-route-forward-on-current-gen-consoles-like-series-x-ps5-or-ps5-pro","title":"DF Weekly: The GTA 6 60fps Debate Returns: Is There a Route Forward on Current-Gen Consoles Like Series X, PS5 or PS5 Pro? | Digital Foundry","content":"Jun 29, 2026 — GTA 6 will ship with a 30fps or 40fps mode on PS5 Pro than a 60fps option. $99.99/£89.99 for the "Ultimate Edition".
Way back in March 2024, we considered the arguments for and against when it came to the prospect of a 60fps version of Grand Theft Auto 6 on current-gen consoles: Xbox Series S, Xbox Series X, PS5 and PS5 Pro.
No, GTA 6 will not support 60fps on any current console52%
The PS5 Pro is the most powerful current-gen console, so it makes sense to expect that it would be the most likely to offer a mode that offers a higher update rate than 30fps.
However, it's worth bearing in mind that the console only offers a fractional CPU performance bump over base PS5, with most of its advantage deriving from better GPU horsepower, improved RT acceleration and support for PSSR upscaling.
None of these features really shift the needle in terms of alleviating the CPU burden, so it looks much more likely that GTA 6 will ship with a 30fps or 40fps mode on PS5 Pro than a 60fps option."},{"url":"https://www.standesk.eu/post/best-console-for-gta-6-2026","title":"Best Console for GTA 6 2026 | PS5 vs Xbox Series X|S | Standesk","content":"The bigger question is whether you should buy a standard PS5, PS5 Slim, digital edition or PS5 Pro.
PS5 Pro may become the better premium experience, but it should not be presented as mandatory unless Rockstar or Sony confirms specific differences.
But until official requirements are published, no one can confirm the exact CPU, GPU, RAM, VRAM or storage requirements.
Do not assume the PC version will launch in 2027 unless officially confirmed.
For Xbox Series S, a 1080p or 1440p monitor may be more practical.
However, Xbox Series X is the stronger Xbox option and may be the better choice for players who want a premium GTA 6 experience.
For PS5 and Xbox Series X, a 4K gaming monitor or 4K TV with low input lag is the best direction."}]}

The game's FPS has yet to be ...Read more","score":0.75377536,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://games.gg/grand-theft-auto-vi/guides/gta-6-ps-5-exclusive-features","title":"GTA 6 PS5 Exclusive Features: DualSense & PS5 Pro Bonuses | GAMES.GG","content":"# GTA 6 PS5 Exclusive Features: DualSense & PS5 Pro Bonuses. Every PS5-exclusive GTA 6 feature explained: DualSense haptics, Tempest 3D audio, integrated speaker, and near-instant load times. Grand Theft Auto 6 launches on PS5 and Xbox Series X|S simultaneously, but PlayStation players get a set of platform-specific bonuses that Xbox owners won't see. None of these features will make or break the game, but they add a layer of immersion that's hard to ignore once you know what's there. ## What PS5-exclusive features does GTA 6 have? Sony has confirmed four distinct PS5-exclusive additions for GTA 6: **DualSense haptic feedback**, **adaptive triggers**, **Tempest 3D Audio**, **integrated controller speaker support**, and **near-instant load times powered by the PS5's SSD**. The DualSense's haptic system is one of the more underused features across the PS5 library outside of Sony's own first-party titles. **Tempest 3D Audio** was one of the headline features at the PS5's launch, and it's getting proper support in GTA 6.","score":0.7253574,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.polygon.com/gta-6-plays-best-on-ps5-pro-rockstar-game","title":"GTA 6 PS5-exclusive features detailed, PS5 Pro enhanced confirmed","content":"Sony and Rockstar Games say that *Grand Theft Auto 6* \"plays best on PS5,\" pointing out several unique features of the PlayStation 5 hardware that the game will take advantage of, and which won't be available to Xbox Series X players. Sony and Rockstar have a marketing partnership for *GTA 6*, and Sony is hoping the game's arrival will finally convince players still using the PlayStation 4 — on which you can still play *Grand Theft Auto Online* and *Grand Theft Auto 5*, as well as *Fortnite* and *Minecraft* — to upgrade. This is odd, since if *GTA 6* is a golden opportunity to persuade PS4 owners to upgrade to PS5, it's also a good opportunity to persuade PS5 owners to upgrade to PS5 Pro. And there's no Xbox equivalent to the Pro, so it will definitely present the most high-fidelity *GTA 6* experience available, at least until a PC version launches.","score":0.6680367,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.77,"request_id":"01a24ee1-288a-4871-9d45-7037ad64bf6a"}
